task: GitHub #250 — combobox-freetext PLAN: add nullable `venue` text column to crm_meetings

snippets.description: crm_meetings table definition — insertion point for the new nullable `venue: text('venue')` column. No existing column is modified; all current columns (leadId, organizerId, leadOrganizerId, startAt, meetingUrl, notes, outcome, deletedAt, reminder checkpoints) are untouched.

Pre-flight drift check performed before authoring migration 0026: last journal idx is 25, tag '0025_mature_aaron_stack', matching the highest-numbered file on disk (0025_mature_aaron_stack.sql). No duplicate-prefix files, no untracked .sql files found in drizzle/. Clean to proceed with 0026 as the next sequential migration.
Project convention requiring the journal/file drift check before running `bun run db:generate`, and the known prior incident (drizzle/0014 + a merge-time idx:15 collision) that motivates this check.
snippets.content: Before running `bun run db:generate`, confirm `drizzle/meta/_journal.json`'s last `idx` matches the highest-numbered `.sql` file in `drizzle/` by filename, AND scan `drizzle/` for duplicate-prefix or stray files...
